title: util.StartsWithValidTransport hard-codes known transports
body:
**Description**

As of 30c07b7d61526fbc9eb563323c5fd8455d48f843 , `util.StartsWithValidTransport` both hard-codes a list of transports (instead of using `c/image/transports`), and seems unused. Can it be removed?

comments.body: I don't have an issue with removing it.   Want to open a PR?
